restaurants.name: Downtown — الفرع الرئيسي
restaurants.address: 16 Maarouf St., Champollion St. Intersection, Near Supreme Court, Downtown Cairo
restaurants.description: The iconic 4-story flagship restaurant serving Cairo since the 1950s. Listed in TasteAtlas top 100 most legendary restaurants worldwide and Guinness World Records.

restaurants.name: Mokattam — المقطم
restaurants.address: Road 9, In Front of Gad Restaurant, Mokattam, Cairo
restaurants.description: Serving the Mokattam community with the same authentic recipe and quality that made the Downtown flagship legendary.

restaurants.name: Nasr City — مدينة نصر
restaurants.address: Omar Ibn El Khattab St., Citystars Mall Phase 2, 6th Floor Food Court, Nasr City, Cairo
restaurants.description: Located inside Citystars Mall — one of Cairo's premier shopping destinations, serving authentic koshary to Nasr City residents and shoppers.

restaurants.name: New Cairo — التجمع الخامس (First Mall)
restaurants.address: Plot 124, El Bonouk St., Sector 1, City Center, 5th Compound, Inside First Mall 124, Ground Floor, New Cairo
restaurants.description: Bringing the legendary Downtown taste to the New Cairo 5th Compound community inside First Mall.

restaurants.name: New Cairo — التجمع (Banks Center)
restaurants.address: Bank Companies Street, Behind El Ahly Bank, New Cairo
restaurants.description: Conveniently located in the New Cairo banking and business district, perfect for a quick lunch or dinner.

restaurants.name: Sheikh Zayed — الشيخ زايد
restaurants.address: 26th of July Spine, Safwa City, El Sheikh Zayed, 6th of October, Giza
restaurants.description: Serving the Sheikh Zayed and 6th of October community with Egypt's most beloved koshary experience.
